Tests the result of raising negative infinity to the power of six using Math.pow.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It verifies that raising negative infinity to the power of 6 results in positive infinity. The assertion uses the `assert` function to confirm that the expression `Math.pow(-Infinity, 6) === Infinity` evaluates to true. This test is likely part of a broader test suite to ensure the correct functionality of mathematical operations in JavaScript.
